name: Gemini Cloud Assist MCP Server (Google Cloud)
what_it_does: Official Google Cloud Platform MCP server for Gemini Cloud Assist, enabling AI agents to query GCP resources, get cloud assistance, manage infrastructure, and access Google Cloud services via natural language.
use_cases: Querying Google Cloud resources (VMs, GKE clusters, Cloud SQL) from agents
Getting AI-powered recommendations for GCP infrastructure optimization
Reading Cloud Logging and Monitoring data for observability
Managing GCP resources and configurations from agent workflows
Troubleshooting GCP deployments with AI assistance
best_when: An agent needs to manage or query Google Cloud Platform resources, get infrastructure recommendations, or access GCP monitoring and logging data.
avoid_when: You're not using Google Cloud — use aws-mcp or azure-mcp for other cloud providers.

auth.notes: Application Default Credentials (ADC) for flexibility: gcloud CLI auth, service account JSON key, or Workload Identity (recommended for GKE). GCP IAM roles control fine-grained access.

pricing.free_tier_limits: GCP free tier: $300 credit for 90 days; Gemini Cloud Assist may have separate pricing
pricing.paid_tiers: GCP services billed by usage; Gemini Cloud Assist pricing per request
pricing.notes: MCP server is open source. GCP subscription and appropriate APIs enabled required. Costs depend on which GCP services are accessed.

performance.rate_limits: GCP API quotas apply per project and per API

known_agent_gotchas: Application Default Credentials require gcloud CLI setup or service account JSON — complex for containerized agents
Workload Identity Federation is the correct production auth pattern — requires GKE and IAM configuration
GCP API quotas are per-project and may need manual increase for high-volume agents
Project ID is required for most operations — agents must know which project to target
Tool is relatively new (2025) — may have breaking changes as Cloud Assist evolves
Different GCP services require different IAM roles — plan permissions carefully
agent_readiness.security_notes: Excellent security: GCP IAM provides fine-grained access control, Workload Identity eliminates service account key files, all traffic over HTTPS. Enterprise compliance certifications match Azure/AWS.

security_score_components.security_notes: Best-in-class cloud security. Workload Identity eliminates static credentials. IAM conditions provide fine-grained, time-limited access. FedRAMP High authorized services available.
